naru.name: Naru
description: Head editor and producer on 12 critically acclaimed Korean feature films. Collaborated with directors including Kim Ki-duk and Jung Ji-woo. Premieres at Cannes, Berlin, and Venice.
Former researcher with first-author publications in top-tier SCIE-indexed psychiatry journals.
Film and education from Dongguk University and Korea University.
Using AI workflows, built the backend and frontend for all Nasun products, including smart contracts and leaderboard systems.

overclocked.name: Overclocked
description: 20+ years in film, television, and commercial production. Wrote and directed theatrically released films. Past clients include Microsoft, Nike, IBM, PBS, and Jeep.
Built the Gen Sol multiplayer alpha in Unreal Engine 5 (C++), deployed AWS infrastructure, and integrated Web3 tooling.
English Literature from University of Michigan.
Leads ecosystem development and community coordination.

joinUs.title: JOIN OUR TEAM
joinUs.description: Join us and build the future of creativity, entertainment, and finance. We are looking for advisors, founding members, collaborators, and partners. Remote work is available for all positions.
